category_sources: source_facts.description identifies helm-docs as a tool that automatically generates markdown documentation for Helm charts.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives the project/formula name as helm-docs.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/norwoodj/helm-docs, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states markdown documentation generation for Helm charts.
